glossary.name: retail_banking_product_specs
glossary.description: Governed ODPS-aligned demo product specifications for the retail banking stakeholder slice.

product_specs.product_objective: Provide governed customer intelligence for onboarding, servicing, support, and customer-risk workflows across the retail banking domain.
product_specs.business_definition: Governed product boundary for the retail banking customer 360 view, linking customer profile, account servicing, and interaction signals into one business-facing product specification.

provenance.change_reason: Initial ODPS retail-banking product-spec demo slice
